title: SOL 4pk Large Collagen Chewy Rolls Long Lasting Dog Chews for Dogs, 25cm of Wholesome Savoury Chicken Flavour, Training Treats, Supports Dental Health, Durable Chews for Boredom Relief
features: Dog Long Lasting Chews -Enjoy hours of chewing fun with our Collagen Chew Rolls, specially crafted for dogs who love to chew. These durable treats keep your furry friend engaged, helping to alleviate boredom & dog anxiety.

Supports Joint Health - Rich in collagen, these chews promote joint mobility and overall health, making them ideal for large and active dogs. They support strong bones and joints, enhancing your dog’s playtime and daily activities.

Delicious Chicken Flavour - With an irresistible chicken taste that dogs adore, these natural dog treats are a favourite reward. Treat your furry friend to something special that they will love, making training and bonding moments even more delightful.

Convenient Packaging - Each large dog chew is carefully packed to preserve freshness and flavour. These chews are always ready for your dog, whether during trips, training sessions, or daily rewards. Keep them in a cool, dry place.
Pet Reminders - Whether you're offering rawhide-free chews or chew sticks for dogs, always supervise your dog while chewing and make sure fresh water is available at all times.

These chews promote joint health, reduce boredom, and provide a tasty reward for dogs, enhancing playtime and daily activities. How do I ensure my dog enjoys these chews? Offer these tasty chicken-flavoured chews during training sessions or as a reward to keep your dog engaged and motivated. Are these chews suitable for all dog breeds? Yes, they are designed for all breeds, especially large dogs that enjoy long-lasting, durable chews. How should I store these dog chews? Simply keep the chews in a cool, dry place to preserve their freshness and flavour. Can I give these chews to puppies? Yes, these treats are suitable for puppies, but always supervise chewing and provide fresh water during use.
